name: T3-WF-6/7 scheduled task
description: A minimal single-agent workflow fired by a schedule trigger. Shared by T3-WF-6 (target_mode personal_cloud) and T3-WF-7 (target_mode local, desktop) — the target mode is chosen at trigger time, not in the definition. Version-pinned tier-3 fixture (specs/developing/testing/scenarios.md#T3-WF-6, #T3-WF-7).

steps.label: Do the scheduled tick
steps.name: tick
steps.prompt: Perform the scheduled maintenance check and report ran=true.
